task: Extend the AIOS ask interface so an ask can emit a proposed smart-contract seed for operator review without bypassing acceptance or dispatch policy.

external_resource_check.reason: This is local contract-seed generation and does not depend on current external API behavior.

frictions: Ask artifacts are useful but still require the founder to manually translate intent into a contract skeleton.
The interface should reduce ceremony without granting execution authority.

specialist_assignment.job: Review that ask-generated seeds remain proposed and non-executing.
